nasb.text: do not merely look out for your own personal interests, but also for the interests of others.

esv.text: Let each of you look not only to his own interests, but also to the interests of others.

cnv.text: 各人不要單顧自己的事，也要顧別人的事。

ccb.text: 各人不要只顾自己的事，也要为别人的需要着想。

csbs.text: 每个人不要只注重自己的事，也要注重别人的事。
